name: Small Standing Glass Display Case
description: A finely crafted upright display case with clear panels on all four sides. Commonly found within the Temple of Space, it is used to exhibit precious and fragile treasures.\nThough the case appears delicate at first glance, it is in fact built with remarkable sturdiness. Even the transparent panels themselves are specially made. Anyone attempting to break it by brute force would likely manage little more than leaving a few faint scratches on its surface.
